title: attention/GeoRefine qllm_bundle integration gate
goal: Connect the attention/GeoRefine artifact contract to Noesis/qLLM. Validate qllm_bundle.json checksums/certificates/graduation evidence, load it through qLLM, and feed the verified artifact into Noesis qllm-load-checkpoint.
acceptance: A fixture qllm_bundle.json is validated before load
checksum/certificate failure causes a clear failure
verified bundle can be consumed by the Noesis qLLM checkpoint path
